title: CogUtilities
description: Various utility features for Create-Ive Cogs SMP
body:
# CogUtilities
A collection of various utility features for the Create-Ive Cogs SMP

Currently includes a Nuclear Waste Barrel (Empty, Full, and Decayed)
The Full Waste Barrel will decay into the Decayed Waste Barrel.

Currently there are no recipes as the mod is in beta, however there may be recipes in the future

You may use this in your modpacks, however it is meant mainly for Create-Ive Cogs and will mostly have features for that server.
